title: acanthaceae
intro: The acanthaceae rank refers to a family of flowering plants, commonly known as the thistle or acanthus family. This family is characterized by its diverse range of plants, including thistles, acanthus, and other ornamental and wild species. Acanthaceae plants are typically found in warm, temperate, and tropical regions around the world, and often exhibit showy flowers and unique seed dispersal mechanisms. With over 360 genera and 5,000 species, the acanthaceae family is one of the largest and most diverse in the plant kingdom.
